description: Battle result popup layout fixes: bets section horizontal coins, casualties 3-column layout without type text, imperial poets single line, popup spacing/height adjustments, and seppuku result popup improvements
steps: 1. In src/components/BattlePanel.tsx, in the BattleResultPopup component, find the 'Apuestas' section (around line 178-206). Change the coin display per tactic from vertical (column) to horizontal (row). Currently each bid is a div with flexDirection column per tactic. Change the inner layout of each bid entry from column to row: make the CoinIcon and amount display horizontally (flex row with gap), so all bids for a tactic fit in one row.

2. In src/components/BattlePanel.tsx, in the 'Killed figures' (battle.killedFigures) section, remove the text that shows the figure type name (e.g. 'daimyo eliminado', 'shinto eliminado'). Instead show only: ClanShield + player name + FigureTypeIcon + count. Layout: distribute entries in a 3-column grid using CSS grid with grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr) or flexbox with flex-wrap so items are in 3 columns.

3. In src/components/BattlePanel.tsx, in the 'Poetas Imperiales' section, change the death breakdown from two lines ('Seppuku: X muertes' and 'Batalla: Y muertes') to a single line: 'X muertos por Seppuku y Y muertos en Batalla'. This should be rendered in one

element without linebreaks.

4. In src/components/BattlePanel.tsx, reduce the top padding/margin of the popup card. Currently the card has no explicit padding-top override. Add paddingTop: '15px' to the inline style of the .battle-popup-card div. Also increase the maxHeight from '85vh' to a value that provides 25px more on top and 25px more on bottom. Change maxHeight to 'calc(85vh + 50px)' or simply '90vh'.

5. In src/components/BattlePanel.tsx, improve the Seppuku result popup (battleStepPhase === 'seppuku-result'). Center the content, make the troop sacrifice icons larger (increase FigureTypeIcon size from 16 to 28-32), make the VPIcon/HonorIcon larger (from 18 to 28), use MonsterIcon component (imported from ./Icons) for monster figures instead of FigureTypeIcon's default emoji fallback, and color the troop icons with the clan color. Pass the seppukuClan?.color as the color prop for the icons.
acceptance_criteria: Bets section shows coin amounts in a horizontal row, not stacked vertically
Casualties section is in 3-column layout without figure type text labels
Imperial Poets section death breakdown is a single line: 'X muertos por Seppuku y Y muertos en Batalla'
Popup has max 15px between top border and content, maxHeight increased by 50px total
Seppuku result popup has centered content, larger troop/VP/honor icons, monster icon uses MonsterIcon component in clan color
findings: Pre-existing TS errors in ActionPanel.tsx (unused variables) unrelated to this feature. Vite build succeeds. All 5 acceptance criteria implemented: bets horizontal, kills 3-col grid no text, poets single line, popup 90vh + paddingTop 15px, seppuku icons enlarged and clan-colored with MonsterIcon/DaimyoIcon.
